title: Scharfes Kartoffel-Schnitzel
description: A German twist on a classic schnitzel dish, using melted peppers and onions for a sweet and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Russian Milk
ingredients.notes: Buttermilk or sour cream work too

instructions: 1. Cut the potatoes into 1/4 inch thick slices.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together the melted pepper and milk.
3. Dip each potato slice into the milk mixture, then coat in breadcrumbs.
4. Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Fry the coated potatoes for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
6. Serve with dumplings and additional melted pepper, if desired.
